<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Update document"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/documents/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



## PUT /api/v1/documents/\{id\}

Handles the updating of a document by id. Only the document name and is_public flag can be modified.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
